title: Use of Wanted
description: Learn to use 'Wanted' — past tense of want. Express past desires, wishes, and needs. Master wanted in affirmative, negative, and question sentences. Essential for storytelling and describing the past.

subtopics.title: Wanted — Basic Usage
subtopics.description: I wanted tea. She wanted a job. Basic sentences with wanted.

subtopics.title: Wanted in Negatives
subtopics.description: I didn't want. She didn't want to come. Negative sentences with wanted.

subtopics.title: Wanted in Questions
subtopics.description: Did you want? What did she want? Questions with wanted.

subtopics.title: Common Expressions with Wanted
subtopics.description: I always wanted to, She had always wanted — common patterns.

learningObjectives: Use wanted in simple past affirmative sentences
Form negative sentences with did not want / didn't want
Form questions with did + subject + want
Contrast want vs wanted in context
